data.title: Trump Averts Financial Crisis With Tariff Pause, But Not A Recession: Josh Brown
data.description: Trump paused the reciprocal tariff plan, but CNBC's Josh Brown believes gains were a blip and a recession could still occur.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Lose Steam, Trader Warns Of 'New Lows' Under One Condition
data.description: The crypto market is showing signs of cooling after a sharp rally on Wednesday.

data.title: Options Corner: Wild Pricing Dynamics In Advanced Micro Devices Create Profit-Scalping Opportunities
data.description: Thanks to wild pricing dynamics for Advanced Micro Devices options, astute traders can pick up high payout AMD stock puts for low risk.

data.title: What's Going On With VinFast Auto Stock On Thursday?
data.description: VinFast Auto (VFS) shares are down 1.71% as the company launches the VF 6 SUV in the Philippines and expands its EV ecosystem amid broader market pressure.

data.title: Strong Slate, Premium Push Fuel IMAX Forecast Upgrades, Says Analyst
data.description: IMAX Corporation (NYSE:IMAX) received a reiterated Buy rating and $35 price target from Rosenblatt, citing a blowout Q1 box office of $280 million, well above projections. The success of Ne Zha 2 drove $162.6M for IMAX. Despite China trade concerns, no official restrictions surfaced. The company remains well-positioned with strong local content, expanding partnerships, and a blockbuster-packed 2025–2026 film slate.
